quran.arabic: وَلَا تَهِنُوا وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا وَأَنْتُمُ الْأَعْلَوْنَ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
quran.translation: So do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are [true] believers.

dua.arabic: إِنَّمَا أَشْكُو بَثِّي وَحُزْنِي إِلَى اللَّهِ
dua.translation: I only complain of my suffering and my grief to Allah.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Struggling with some personal loss. Please keep me in your prayers.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: May Allah grant peace to everyone going through a hard time.

quran.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ
quran.translation: And We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.

dua.arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
dua.translation: My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while you are the best of inheritors.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Feeling a bit isolated in a new city. Remembering Allah's presence.

quran.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا • إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
quran.translation: "For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease. Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease."

dua.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ
dua.translation: "O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, from inability and laziness, from miserliness and cowardice..."

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Feeling a bit overwhelmed with exams, asking for prayers.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Anxiety is high today, but trust in Allah is higher.

quran.translation: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor].

dua.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ
dua.translation: Praise be to Allah, many, pure, blessed praises.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Alhamdulillah for a peaceful morning by the window.

quran.translation: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

dua.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا
dua.translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and plant firmly our feet.

community.name: Anonymous
community.text: Waiting for a medical result. Patiently trusting His plan.
